title: K-200 Integration Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 Integration Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-476-H. Revision: H. Type: procedure. Author: Felix Herrera. Created: 2024-01-30. Last modified: 2024-05-27. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Integration subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1061, P-1152.
